scripts.test: npm run build && RUNIAC_HOME_GUIDE_FAKE_PROVIDER=deterministic firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore --project runiac-functions-test "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/test/progressionCalculator.test.js lib/test/streakExpiry.test.js lib/test/completeRun.test.js lib/test/completeRunCallableSurface.test.js lib/test/monthlyLeaderboard.test.js lib/test/monthlyLeaderboardWriter.test.js lib/test/leaderboardMockDataset.test.js lib/test/leaderboardSeedFirestore.test.js lib/test/leaderboardSeedVerification.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardInventory.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardMockData.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardSafety.test.js lib/test/seedLeaderboardCleanup.test.js lib/test/leaderboardSeedAuthorization.test.js lib/test/notificationDevices.test.js lib/test/notificationDispatch.test.js lib/test/notificationScheduledDispatch.test.js lib/test/homeGuideEvidence.test.js lib/test/homeGuideModel.test.js lib/test/homeGuideQuotaCache.test.js lib/test/homeGuideAgentSurface.test.js lib/test/homeGuideAgentCallableSurface.test.js"
scripts.leaderboard:seed:emulator: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --only functions,firestore --project runiac-functions-test "node lib/src/leaderboard/seedLeaderboardMockData.js --project runiac-functions-test --period 2026-07 --run-id leaderboard-je-emulator-local --region-id jurong-east --users-per-region 100 --lifecycle"
